question: Will Iran's Internet not be "heavily filtered/whitelisted" for most users before May 2026?
resolution_criteria: This question will resolve as Yes if [NetBlocks](https://netblocks.org/) reports that Internet access in Iran is <u>not</u> "heavily filtered/whitelisted" for most users, for a continuous period of more than 24 hours, before May 1, 2026 (IRST).
